seoTitle: St Georges Basin vs St Helens Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Georges Basin and St Helens Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Georges Basin vs St Helens Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Georges Basin and St Helens Park.
heading: St Georges Basin vs St Helens Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Georges Basin, New South Wales and St Helens Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Helens Park has a lower overall climate risk score (44/100) compared to St Georges Basin (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Georges Basin or St Helens Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Georges Basin has a flood risk score of 42/100, while St Helens Park scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Georges Basin scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. St Helens Park scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Georges Basin or St Helens Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Helens Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
